label: FuZE experimentally demonstrates sustained microsecond-scale neutron production during a quiescent period

provenance.source_span: LETTER | SEPTEMBER 03 2024 Hall MHD waves: A fundamental departure from their MHD counterparts Swadesh M. Mahajan ; Prerana Sharma ; Manasvi Lingam  Phys. Plasmas 31, 090701 (2024) https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0227375  

strengths: Adds FuZE operational evidence for quiescent, neutron-producing Z-pinch plasmas.
weaknesses: Neutron production and quiescence do not identify the exact m=1 stabilization mechanism.
